titles.text: アテナの家庭盤 ファミリーゲームス

descriptions.text: Variety game collection was recorded board game of nostalgia. I record five sugoroku like to play using the board that mimics of Othello-like "Reversi", the luster of diamond "King Diamond", hat up game "Kopit", "rocket", the Game of Life-style of "Bankers". Can be simultaneously play up to four people maximum. Let Moriagaro in the good old game a long time ago!
